name: CLX - Admin Bulk Import Leads v1

meta.notes: Admin-only bulk import of existing client lists into the leads table. POST /webhook/admin/bulk-import-leads. Body: { leads: [{full_name, email, phone, city, ...}], source?, campaign_tag?, lead_type?, lead_score? }. Max 1000 per request, dedupes within batch by email. Source/campaign_tag let downstream campaigns target the imported segment. Cross-batch dedupe (existing leads with same email) is NOT done at the workflow layer — add a UNIQUE constraint on leads.email + on_conflict=email handling if you need that later.
